sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, start_time TIME, end_time TIME);
INSERT INTO events (event_id, start_time, end_time) VALUES (1, TIME '01:00:00', TIME '02:00:00');
INSERT INTO events (event_id, start_time, end_time) VALUES (2, TIME '03:00:00', TIME '04:30:00');
SELECT event_id, date_diff('minute', start_time, end_time) AS duration FROM events;
UPDATE events SET end_time = TIME '05:00:00' WHERE event_id = 2;
